exportDimensions: 2344x3200 px as-read (≈2x); CSS ≈ 1172x1600 px. Divide all raw measurements below by 2 for CSS px.
layoutSummary: Fixed left sidebar (~250px CSS wide, white with subtle right border/shadow) + main content area on a very light gray page (#F6F6F6 / #F9FAFB). Main area: sticky-feel top header row (page title left, support/bell/avatar right), then a horizontal tab bar with a purple active underline, then a vertically stacked sequence of report sections. Each section = bold section heading + one-line muted description + a grid of white rounded chart/list cards. Card grids alternate between an asymmetric 2-col split (wide chart card ~64% + narrow card ~34%) for General Summary, a full-width card for Events by severity, and even 50/50 two-col splits for Leaked Data and Domain Squatting. Generous vertical rhythm (~32-40px CSS between sections), ~24px gutters between cards.

sections.name: Sidebar / Left Navigation
sections.description: Full-height white vertical nav, ~250px CSS wide. Top: purple shield-logo mark + 'purevpn' wordmark (mark is purple #5B3DF5/#7C30F7). Below: 'Team Name' caption + 'Bending Spoons' bold, with a circular collapse chevron button (‹) floating on the sidebar's right edge. A thin divider separates the team block. Then two groups of nav items separated by dividers: group 1 = Dashboard, Setup VPN, Downloads, Manual Configuration; group 2 = Identity Protection (ACTIVE), Remove my Data, Password Manager; group 3 = Profile Settings, Subscription, Feedback. Each item = leading line-icon + label. Active item (Identity Protection) has a light lavender pill background (#ECE8FF) with purple text/icon (#5B3DF5) and a thin purple left accent bar. Inactive items are muted gray (#637381/#717171). Bottom: an 'Upgrade Plan' promo card with a gold crown icon, gold gradient background (#FFC668 / #FFE9C-ish), and a '-20%' pill badge.
sections.layout: fixed sidebar, vertically stacked item list with grouped dividers
sections.notes: Active pill only spans item width with rounded corners; icons are 2px stroke line style ~20px.

sections.name: Top Header Bar
sections.description: Row above the tab bar. Left: page title 'Identity theft protection' in large bold near-black. Right cluster: 'Live Support' text with a chat-bubble icon, a notification bell icon with a small red unread dot, and a circular avatar showing initials 'SA' on a light lavender fill with purple text.
sections.layout: space-between row, title left / actions right
sections.notes: Avatar ~36px CSS circle; bell dot is a tiny red circle top-right of the bell.

sections.name: Tab Bar
sections.description: Horizontal tab navigation directly under the header, separated from content by a full-width hairline. Tabs left-aligned with icon+label each: 'Threat overview' (shield, ACTIVE), 'Monitored assets' (stacked layers), 'Employee exposure' (people), 'Domain squatting' (link/chain), 'Alerts & settings' (gear). Active tab has near-black text and a 2px purple underline bar (#5B3DF5) beneath it; inactive tabs are muted gray with gray icons.
sections.layout: horizontal inline tab list with bottom border + active underline
sections.notes: Underline sits on the shared bottom border; only under the active label width.

sections.name: General Summary (section)
sections.description: Section heading 'General Summary' (bold) + muted one-line description 'A high-level overview of the security assessment findings, overall risk posture, and key recommendations.' Below: a 2-col asymmetric grid. LEFT (wide) card 'Unresolved comments' with an info (i) icon, a 4-item colored-dot legend (Low green, Medium yellow, High orange, Critical red), and a multi-line chart. RIGHT (narrow) card 'Days unresolved' with (i) icon, same 4-color legend (note Low here is BLUE), and a 2x2-ish stat grid: '8 Days / Critical Events' (red label), '6 Days / Low Events' (green label), '6 Days / High Events', '3 Days / Medium Events' (yellow label), separated by hairlines.
sections.notes: Card corner radius ~16px CSS; subtle card shadow; internal padding ~20-24px.

sections.name: Events by severity (section card)
sections.description: Full-width white card. Title 'Events by severity' + (i) icon, 4-dot legend (Low green, Medium yellow, High orange, Critical red). Body is a large smooth stacked gradient AREA chart: rolling smooth curves, green-tinted band at bottom rising into yellow/orange humps mid-chart and a dominant warm red/coral gradient fill dominating the right half. Y axis 0-1000 (labels 0,250,500,500,750,1000 — note duplicate 500 in export), x axis single label '900' at left. Soft vertical gradient fades to transparent at the bottom of each band.
sections.notes: Areas use vertical (180deg) gradients fading to ~0 opacity at baseline; curves are monotone/smooth (Catmull-Rom feel), overlapping semi-transparent bands.

sections.name: Leaked Data (section)
sections.description: Heading 'Leaked Data' + description 'Details on exposed credentials, sensitive files, and other data found leaked across public sources.' Below: even 2-col grid. LEFT card 'Total amount of events' + (i), legend (Combo List orange, Exposed purple, Info Stealer red) — a vertical BAR chart over weekdays Mon-Sun, y-axis 0-60k (10k steps). Bars use gradient fills: tall red-orange gradient bars (Wed/Thr peak ~55k-44k) and a shorter purple bar (Sat ~19k). RIGHT card 'Leaked data top unresolved events' + (i), a 4-dot severity legend, then a list of rows: name (bold) + subtext (breach source, muted, truncated e.g. 'RockYou20…', 'SWVL Brea…', 'Adsqua…') with a right-aligned severity pill (Low=green, High=orange, Critical=red).
sections.notes: Bars have rounded top corners and a top-to-bottom gradient (red→orange 'linear-gradient(90deg,#FF5D5C,#FFB454)'; purple bar #8145FF/#7C30F7). Rows separated by hairlines.

sections.name: Domain Squatting (section)
sections.description: Heading 'Domain Squatting' + description 'Details on lookalike domains registered by third parties that may be used for phishing or brand impersonation.' Even 2-col grid. LEFT card 'Unresolved Events' + (i), legend (Combo List yellow, Exposed Credentials orange, Infostealers red) — a single wide horizontal STACKED bar spanning the chart: red top segment, orange middle, yellow bottom, y-axis 0-1000, x-axis 0-900. RIGHT card 'Leaked data top unresolved rvents' (sic) + (i), 4-dot legend, list of lookalike domains: 'purevpm.com / 91% similari…' (Critical), 'purevpn.us / 80% similari…' (Critical), 'purevpnn.io / 75% similari…' (High), 'pvreupn.com / 75% similari…' (Medium) — each domain bold + muted similarity subtext + right severity pill.
sections.notes: Note the 'rvents' typo and duplicate y-axis '500' labels are in the source export — replicate for pixel fidelity if faithful to Figma. Stacked bar segments are flat saturated colors (no gradient), full radius on outer corners.

reusableComponents.name: SidebarNavItem
reusableComponents.description: Leading line-icon + label row, rounded pill hover/active state
reusableComponents.variants: default (muted), active (lavender #ECE8FF pill + purple text + left accent bar), hover

reusableComponents.name: UpgradePlanCard
reusableComponents.description: Gold-gradient promo card with crown icon, label, and discount pill

reusableComponents.name: Tab
reusableComponents.description: Icon+label tab with active purple underline

reusableComponents.name: Avatar
reusableComponents.variants: initials on lavender fill (SA); could support image

reusableComponents.name: IconButton
reusableComponents.description: Bare icon action (bell, live support, collapse chevron)

reusableComponents.name: ChartCard
reusableComponents.description: White rounded card: title + (i) info icon + optional legend row + chart body

reusableComponents.name: StatBlock
reusableComponents.description: Large number ('N Days') over a small colored semantic label

reusableComponents.name: ListRow
reusableComponents.description: Title + muted subtext on left, severity badge right-aligned, hairline separator

reusableComponents.name: SeverityBadge
reusableComponents.description: Rounded pill with leading dot + label on tinted bg
reusableComponents.variants: Low (green #00BA00 on #39D98A1F), Medium (yellow), High (orange #FFB454 on #FFC668-tint), Critical (red #FF5C5C on #FFDADA)

reusableComponents.name: InfoIcon
reusableComponents.description: Small circular (i) tooltip trigger next to card titles

charts: Multi-line chart (Unresolved comments): 4 smooth-ish polylines — Low #00BA00, Medium #FFC668/#EFE064, High #FFB454, Critical #FF5C5C. Y 0-1000 (250 steps), X 0-900. Light gray gridlines, no fill.
Stat/metric card (Days unresolved): not a plotted chart — 4 StatBlocks; legend Low here is BLUE #5CC8FF.

Smooth stacked gradient area/stream chart (Events by severity): 4 overlapping semi-transparent bands with vertical fade-to-transparent gradients — green #7DE3B0→transparent (Low), yellow/gold #FFC668 (Medium), orange #FFB454 (High), coral/red #FF928E→#FF5C5C (Critical, dominant right side). Y 0-1000, X min label 900.

Vertical bar chart (Total amount of events / Leaked Data): weekday categories Mon-Sun, Y 0-60k (10k steps). Bars with rounded tops and gradient fills: red→orange 'linear-gradient(90deg,#FF5D5C 0%,#FFB454 100%)' for Combo List/Info Stealer, solid purple #8145FF/#7C30F7 for Exposed.

Horizontal stacked bar (Unresolved Events / Domain Squatting): one full-width bar, 3 flat segments — red #FF0000 (Infostealers, top), orange #FF5C47/#FFB454 (Exposed Credentials, middle), yellow #FFC668/#EFE064 (Combo List, bottom). Y 0-1000, X 0-900.

assetsNeeded.name: purevpn_logo.svg
assetsNeeded.note: Purple shield mark + 'purevpn' wordmark; exists at Brandkit/logos/purevpn_logo.svg

assetsNeeded.name: sidebar-icons
assetsNeeded.note: Line icons: dashboard/grid, setup-vpn, downloads, manual-config, identity/face-scan, remove-data, password/lock, profile, subscription/receipt, feedback/chat

assetsNeeded.name: tab-icons
assetsNeeded.note: shield (Threat overview), stacked-layers (Monitored assets), people (Employee exposure), link/chain (Domain squatting), gear (Alerts & settings)

assetsNeeded.name: crown-icon
assetsNeeded.note: Gold crown for Upgrade Plan card

fidelityNotes: Card radius ~16px CSS; sidebar active pill & badges ~8-12px; badge pills fully rounded.
Cards are pure white on #F6F6F6/#F9FAFB page with a very soft, low-opacity drop shadow (subtle elevation, no hard border) — some cards also have a 1px near-transparent border.

Events-by-severity area chart is the trickiest: overlapping SEMI-TRANSPARENT bands each with a 180deg gradient fading to ~0% alpha at the baseline; smooth monotone curves; warm red band (#FF928E→#FF5C5C) dominates right half. Reference brand gradients: linear-gradient(180deg,#FE7062,#FF928E) and #FEBBBA→#FF928E family.
Bar-chart gradients are top-heavy vertical: red-orange 'linear-gradient(90deg,#FF5D5C,#FFB454)' (rendered vertically in bars) and solid purple; rounded top corners only.
Domain-squatting horizontal bar segments are FLAT saturated fills (red/orange/yellow), not gradient.
Severity badges: colored leading dot + label on a low-alpha tint of the same hue (e.g. Low green on #39D98A1F, Critical red on #FFDADA). Keep dot+text same hue family.
Active tab underline is a 2px purple (#5B3DF5) bar sitting on the shared bottom hairline (#EEECEC).
Sidebar active item: #ECE8FF pill + #5B3DF5 text/icon + thin purple left accent.
Upgrade Plan card uses a warm gold gradient (approx #FFC668 base) with a small solid discount pill.
Hairline dividers ~1px at #EEECEC/#DFDCDC; gridlines even lighter (#F2F2F2).
Chart axis labels are light gray (#8C8C8C) ~11px; note the source export has duplicate '500' y-labels and a 'rvents' typo — replicate only if strict pixel-fidelity is required, otherwise correct.
Notification bell has a tiny red (#FF0000) unread dot badge.
interactions: Tabs: click switches Threat overview / Monitored assets / Employee exposure / Domain squatting / Alerts & settings; active gets purple underline.
Sidebar collapse: chevron (‹) button collapses/expands the sidebar (icon-only rail).
Sidebar nav: hover state on items; active route highlighted with lavender pill.
Info (i) icons: hover/click tooltip explaining each metric.
Chart legends: likely toggle series visibility on click; hover shows tooltips on data points/bars/areas.
List rows: hover highlight; badges are status indicators (possibly click-through to event detail).
Notification bell: opens notifications; unread dot state.
Upgrade Plan: CTA to billing/upgrade with -20% promo.
Days-unresolved / top-events lists may support sort or 'view all' expansion.
responsiveNotes: Desktop (shown): fixed ~250px sidebar + fluid content with multi-column card grids. Tablet: collapse sidebar to an icon rail (the chevron already implies this); reduce asymmetric General Summary split toward stacking; keep two-col card grids until ~900px then stack. Mobile: sidebar becomes an off-canvas drawer (hamburger); header title shrinks (~22px) with actions condensing to icons; tab bar becomes horizontally scrollable; all card grids collapse to a single column full-width; charts keep aspect ratio and gain horizontal scroll or reduced tick density; legends wrap to multiple lines; stat 2x2 grid in Days-unresolved stacks to a single column; list rows keep name/subtext left with badge right (wrap badge below on very narrow widths).
